allow: PowerShell(docker info 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "Proxy|Registry|HTTP"; Write-Output "---"; Get-DnsClientServerAddress -AddressFamily IPv4 | Where-Object { $_.ServerAddresses } | Format-Table -AutoSize)
PowerShell(docker compose exec -T web poetry run python manage.py import_itemline_xlsx)

PowerShell(docker compose exec -T web poetry run python manage.py shell -c "from core.models.item_stage import ItemStage; [print\(s.id, repr\(s.name\), repr\(s.display_name\), repr\(getattr\(s,'code_prefix',''\)\)\) for s in ItemStage.objects.all\(\).order_by\('name'\)]")

PowerShell(docker compose exec -T web poetry run python manage.py shell -c "from core.models.line_process import LineProcess; from core.models.line import Line; print\('LineProcess:'\); [print\(' ', lp.id, repr\(lp.name\) if hasattr\(lp, 'name'\) else lp\) for lp in LineProcess.objects.all\(\)[:30]]; print\('Existing lines sample:'\); [print\(' ', l.line_name, '->', l.line_process_id\) for l in Line.objects.all\(\)[:5]]")
PowerShell(docker compose exec -T web poetry run python manage.py import_itemline_xlsx --commit)
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec tbsmproduction-web-1 sh -c 'which python; .venv/bin/python --version; ls /app/.venv/bin')
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec -w /app tbsmproduction-web-1 .venv/bin/python manage.py check)
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec -w /app tbsmproduction-web-1 sed -n '30,35p' core/urls.py)
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec -w /app tbsmproduction-web-1 ls -la static/js/bom_template.js)

PowerShell(\(Get-Command poetry -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; \(Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; Get-ChildItem -Path . -Filter "manage.py" | Select-Object -First 1; Get-ChildItem -Path . -Filter "pyproject.toml" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; Get-ChildItem -Path . -Filter ".venv" -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1)

PowerShell(Get-Command poetry -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Source; Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Source; if \(Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\AppData\\Roaming\\pypoetry\\venv\\Scripts\\poetry.exe"\) { Write-Output "Poetry exists at: $env:USERPROFILE\\AppData\\Roaming\\pypoetry\\venv\\Scripts\\poetry.exe" }; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\pypoetry" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name; Get-ChildItem "$env:APPDATA\\pypoetry" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name)
PowerShell(Test-Path .venv; Test-Path .venv\\bin; Test-Path .venv\\Scripts; \(Get-ChildItem -Force .venv -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) | Select-Object Name)
PowerShell(docker compose exec web bash -lc "python -X utf8 manage.py import_bom_update_xlsx --dry-run 2>&1 | tail -n 80")
PowerShell(docker compose exec web bash -lc "ls -la /app/.venv/bin/ 2>&1 | head -20; which python python3; poetry --version 2>&1")
PowerShell(docker compose exec web bash -lc "source /app/.venv/bin/activate && python -X utf8 manage.py import_bom_update_xlsx --dry-run 2>&1 | tail -n 100")
Bash(docker compose exec -T web bash -lc 'source /app/.venv/bin/activate && python -X utf8 -c " *)
